'''faraya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyschtymite|kyschtymite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-r-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyschtymite|kyschtymite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| faraya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:færæyæth|færæyæth]] || [[word:færæyæj|færæyæj]] || [[word:færæyæsh|færæyæsh]] || [[word:færæyæ|færæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fararayath|fararayath]] || [[word:fararayaj|fararayaj]] || [[word:fararayash|fararayash]] || [[word:fararaya|fararaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:farayath|farayath]] || [[word:farayaj|farayaj]] || [[word:farayash|farayash]] || [[word:faraya|faraya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:farafyath|farafyath]] || [[word:farafyaj|farafyaj]] || [[word:farafyash|farafyash]] || [[word:farafyaf|farafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:farayatha|farayatha]] || [[word:farayaja|farayaja]] || [[word:farayasha|farayasha]] || [[word:farayaka|farayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:farayath|farayath]] || [[word:farayaj|farayaj]] || [[word:farayash|farayash]] || [[word:faraya|faraya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:farayathal|farayathal]] || [[word:farayajal|farayajal]] || [[word:farayashal|farayashal]] || [[word:farayakal|farayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:farayathatha|farayathatha]] || [[word:farayajaja|farayajaja]] || [[word:farayashasha|farayashasha]] || [[word:farayaka|farayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:farayathan|farayathan]] || [[word:farayajan|farayajan]] || [[word:farayashan|farayashan]] || [[word:farayakan|farayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:farayathaoro|farayathaoro]] || [[word:farayajaoro|farayajaoro]] || [[word:farayashaoro|farayashaoro]] || [[word:farayakaoro|farayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
